project_name: Gruening Health and Wealth - Secure Medicare Intake & Agent Portal

rules: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard system fonts for headings.
H1/H2 must have tight tracking (tracking-tight) to feel modern and authoritative.
Body text must use leading-relaxed for maximal legibility for the 65+ demographic.
Input labels and help text must be at least text-sm and high contrast.

intake_portal.rules: 1-column layout max-w-2xl centered. Use massive padding (p-8 to p-16) to reduce cognitive load. Form inputs must be large (min h-12) for older demographics.

dashboard.rules: High density, strict grid hierarchy. Use p-4 to p-6 inside cards. 1px borders (border-border), flat backgrounds, no heavy drop shadows.

spacing_and_layout.corners: rounded-lg (8px) for structural elements, rounded-full for pills and indicators.

components.forms: Use Shadcn Form + Zod. Inputs MUST have highly visible focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary). Never rely on color alone for errors.
components.cards: Flat background (bg-surface), 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. For interactive cards on hover: -translate-y-0.5 and subtle shadow.
components.navigation: Sticky header. Use 'Crystal Glass' strategy for public site (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-border/50). Nav links must be visible on desktop.
components.buttons: Primary buttons in Deep Forest Green (primary). Disabled states must remain accessible. Minimum tap target 48x48px on mobile.
components.security_signals: CRITICAL: Place lock icons (lucide-react) near all submit buttons. Include 'HIPAA Compliant | 256-bit Encryption' badges in the footer and near document uploads.
components.file_upload: Drag and drop zone with dashed border, muted background. Include explicit helper text regarding secure, encrypted upload for Medicare cards/IDs.

brand_logo.description: Abstract geometric logo for Gruening Health and Wealth

hero_background.description: Warm medical consultation office with golden hour sunlight conveying wealth management and security

intake_demographic.description: Elderly couple sitting together outdoors smiling

professional_consultation.description: Medical professional in white scrub suit

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' for multi-step form transitions, and 'react-dropzone' for the secure document upload.
Implement the landing page first to showcase trust, utilizing the 'hero_background' and 'intake_demographic' images. Follow this with the multi-step intake flow.
For the multi-step intake form: prioritize a step-by-step wizard (Personal Info -> Medicare Details -> SOA e-Signature -> Uploads) to avoid overwhelming users.
SOA E-Signature step MUST look like a formal document canvas. Provide clear 'Sign Here' indicators.
Agent Dashboard must utilize Shadcn Data-Table with robust filtering (e.g., Lead Pipeline, GHL Sync Status).
GHL Sync Status should be visually represented (e.g., green dot 'Synced', yellow dot 'Pending', red dot 'Error').

Implement passwordless magic-link sign-in UI on the Login screen — email input → 'Send Login Link' → 'Check your email' confirmation with a resend cooldown. Keep email + password as an Option B toggle.
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="submit-intake-button"').
Do NOT use HTML-based components for complex interactions; use Shadcn equivalents heavily customized to match the spacing guidelines.
Render the cost analysis and architectural breakdown as a simulated view inside the 'Admin/Compliance Panel' or present it in the README.
